TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed beforefieldinit OpenTelemetryTextToSpeechClient extends Microsoft.Extensions.AI.DelegatingTextToSpeechClient
Public NotInheritable Class OpenTelemetryTextToSpeechClient Inherits DelegatingTextToSpeechClient

Docs.summary: Represents a delegating text-to-speech client that implements the OpenTelemetry Semantic Conventions for Generative AI systems.
Docs.remarks: This class provides an implementation of the Semantic Conventions for Generative AI systems v1.40, defined at . The specification is still experimental and subject to change; as such, the telemetry output by this client is also subject to change.

MemberSignature.Value: public OpenTelemetryTextToSpeechClient (Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ITextToSpeechClient innerClient, Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger? logger = default, string? sourceName = default);

new Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenTelemetryTextToSpeechClient : Microsoft.Extensions.AI.ITextToSpeechClient * Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger * string -> Microsoft.Extensions.AI.OpenTelemetryTextToSpeechClient

Docs.param: The to use for emitting any logging data from the client.
An optional source name that will be used on the telemetry data.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

public bool EnableSensitiveData { get; set; }
.property instance bool EnableSensitiveData
Public Property EnableSensitiveData As Boolean
member this.EnableSensitiveData : bool with get, set
public: property bool EnableSensitiveData { bool get(); void set(bool value); };

Docs.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether potentially sensitive information should be included in telemetry.
Docs.value: if potentially sensitive information should be included in telemetry; if telemetry shouldn't include raw inputs and outputs. The default value is , unless the OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_GENAI_CAPTURE_MESSAGE_CONTENT environment variable is set to "true" (case-insensitive).
Docs.remarks: By default, telemetry includes metadata, such as token counts, but not raw inputs and outputs, such as message content, function call arguments, and function call results. The default value can be overridden by setting the OTEL_INSTRUMENTATION_GENAI_CAPTURE_MESSAGE_CONTENT environment variable to "true". Explicitly setting this property will override the environment variable.
